prediction.reasoning: Based on ITW's historical volatility of approximately 20-25% annually, I estimated a 20-day standard deviation of around $12. Confidence intervals are constructed using normal distribution assumptions around the point estimate, with wider intervals reflecting increased uncertainty over the 20-day horizon.
